idea.title: Lucky Egg Bias
idea.hook: Crack thirty eggs for random drops — but hidden bias rules tilt the odds; place lure crystals to deduce which crystal biases which item.
idea.prototype: Deduction-clicker. Tray of 6 egg slots that refill, 3 lure crystals on a rail. Each crystal secretly tilts one of 3 item-classes (gold/gem/scrap) by ×3. Player taps a crystal then taps an egg to apply the bias; tap a deduction-grid cell to map crystal→class; submit GUESS when all 3 mapped. Win = correct full mapping. Lose = burn 30 cracks or 3 guesses without solving. Daily seed fixes the puzzle so leaderboard scores compare.
idea.mutation_of: CrazyGames 'Throw a Lucky Block' / 'Break a Lucky Egg Brainrots' + reddit r/incremental_games loot-deduction discussions
idea.why_novel: Lucky-block/egg games on CG are pure gambling skins — pull, hope, pull again. Lucky Egg Bias INVERTS gambling into INFERENCE — you decode the RNG instead of riding it. Portals have zero deduction-from-RNG games; the anti-gambling framing is also a defensible USP for Yandex 6+ moderation.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Three overlapping non-timer pressures: 30-crack moves budget + 12-lure resource scarcity + 3-guess lives pool
idea.lose_condition: 30 cracks used without solving OR 3 guess attempts spent on wrong mappings

sources.title: Lucky Egg Bias
sources.snippet: Lucky-block/egg games on CG are gambling skins. Lucky Egg Bias INVERTS gambling into INFERENCE — you decode the RNG instead of riding it. CTR target = vehicle_crash impact moment.

sources.title: Throw a Lucky Block
sources.snippet: CrazyGames new-arrivals signal — lucky-block click-gamble loop. Mutation parent for the lucky-egg shell; the inferred-bias mechanic is the inversion.

sources.title: FIFA Panini Collection
sources.snippet: Google Play newRising — pack-rip / collection mechanic. Same dopamine loop as lucky-egg cracking, repurposed as a deduction surface.

sources.title: vehicle_crash archetype
sources.snippet: Top Yandex thumbnail archetype today is impact/crash moment. Applied to the cover as egg-shattering-mid-air with debris fan to imitate the crash composition.

synthesizer_brief: Mutate the CrazyGames lucky-block gambling loop into a deduction game by hiding a permutation rule (crystal→class bias) and forcing the player to decode it under a three-axis non-timer budget. CTR cover borrows the vehicle_crash 'impact moment' composition from today's Yandex top thumbnails.

alternatives.title: Trail Weaver
alternatives.hook: Drag a single weave-thread through a hex maze to connect 3 colored anchors before the thread runs out.
alternatives.mutation_of: Yandex puzzle-sort cluster + Slither-style continuous-input games
alternatives.why_novel: First puzzle-sort game that compresses Snake-thread into a single-stroke planning puzzle.

alternatives.title: Tile Alchemy
alternatives.hook: Place 4-element tiles in a 4x4 cauldron grid; matching diagonals brew the day's recipe.
alternatives.why_novel: Daily-seed recipe lock turns a match-board into a daily puzzle the same for all players.

alternatives.title: Body Mortuary
alternatives.hook: Drag-and-drop organs into the right slots before the autopsy clock runs out — but the body parts are mislabeled.
alternatives.mutation_of: Yandex 'Body Building' satisfying-cleanup + medical-mismatch puzzle cluster
alternatives.why_novel: Inverts cleanup-satisfaction into a careful-attribution puzzle.

alternatives.title: Throne Verdict
alternatives.hook: Three peasants plead. You have one verdict per minute and limited gold to bribe. Wrong verdicts cost the throne.
alternatives.why_novel: Mobile-first reign-court game with deduction layer over 60-second arcs.

alternatives.title: Ragdoll Foundry
alternatives.hook: Drop ragdolls onto molten conveyor channels; the cooling temperature gates which mold they fit.
alternatives.why_novel: First ragdoll physics game with a deterministic mold-fit gate instead of pure score.
